notes: Salesforce 'Deal won' notification bot — fires a celebratory Closed Won card into a deal or account channel. Distinct from the generic 'Salesforce' bot: use this named bot when the workspace roster has a dedicated 'Deal won' bot. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Pairs naturally with leeroy-jenkins Closed Won opportunity data; the optional End Brand field suits converter/reseller demos where the account and the end brand differ.

examples.name: deal_won
examples.when: An opportunity moves to Closed Won — celebratory post to a deal or account channel.

examples.name: deal_won_with_end_brand
examples.when: Closed Won where the buying account (e.g. a converter/reseller) differs from the end brand the product serves. Useful for value-added-distribution demos.

elements.text: Close date 2025-05-15 · Products: UHF inlays · First foothold at the account
